pageSubtitle: VLSI, Embedded Systems, and PSU strategies for GATE ECE qualifiers.
bannerText: Connect with ECE mentors placed in ISRO, DRDO, BEL, and pursuing VLSI Design at top IITs.

topics.title: M.Tech: VLSI & Embedded Systems
topics.description: Securing the most sought-after ECE specializations.
points: VLSI design at IISc, IITB, and IITM has the highest placement packages.
Prepare for coding rounds (C/C++ & Verilog) required by some IITs.
Keep Microelectronics and Communication Engineering as backup options.

topics.title: PSU & Govt. Labs (ISRO/DRDO)
topics.description: Interview strategies for core electronics recruitment.
points: Focus heavily on Analog & Digital Circuits and Electromagnetic Theory.
Expect hands-on questions about antenna design and signal processing.
Prepare a strong final year B.Tech project presentation.

topics.title: MS/Ph.D. Research Proposals
topics.description: Applying for research programs in Nanoelectronics and Comm Networks.
points: Mention specific tools you know (Cadence, Synopsis, TCAD).
Keep the SOP focused on why you want to transition from B.Tech to Research.
Read 2-3 recent papers published by your target panel/professor.

topics.title: Technical Interviews
points: Be ready to draw CMOS circuits and explain their working.
Revise bode plots, Nyquist criteria, and basic network theorems.
Brush up on basic programming—it's increasingly asked in ECE interviews.
